Name: Cyberman
Description: Cybernetic infantry that marches forward without hesitation.

Name: Raston Warrior Robot
Description: An impossibly fast killing machine.

Name: Dalek
Description: A hateful war machine sealed inside its armored casing.

Name: Ice Warrior
Description: A reptilian armored soldier from Mars.

Name: Yeti
Description: A bulky robotic servant that lumbers straight at intruders.

Name: Silurian
Description: A calculating reptile humanoid from Earth's distant past.

Name: Sontaran
Description: A clone-bred soldier built entirely for war.

Name: Auton
Description: A faceless plastic killer animated by the Nestene Consciousness.

Name: Zygon
Description: A shape-changing reptilian infiltrator from the lost world of Zygor.

Name: Judoon
Description: A rhinoceros-headed space police trooper in heavy armor.

Name: Sea Devil
Description: An amphibious reptile warrior risen from the oceans.

Name: Ogron
Description: A brutal alien mercenary used as muscle by more cunning masters.

Name: Draconian
Description: A proud reptilian noble from the Draconian Empire.

Name: Weeping Angel
Description: A quantum-locked predator that closes distance in impossible bursts.

Name: Slitheen
Description: A massive hunter wearing a stolen human disguise.

Name: Sycorax
Description: An axe-bearing scavenger warlord from the stars.

Name: Mire
Description: A heavily armored war machine built for conquest.

Name: Macra
Description: A giant crab-like horror lurking in the dark passages.
SpeechCue: There is no such thing as Macra.

Name: Silence
Description: A suit-clad confessional predator you forget the instant you look away.

Name: Master
Description: The Master
